de Java Classes Ptolemy II Home Ptolemy Home Skip to sidebar Ptolemy II 6.0.2 Web Edition Download This download of Ptolemy II uses a web launching tool called Web Start that makes installation and updates particularly simple. Quick Sta

and updates particularly simple. Quick Start Installation Details Below are more detailed instructions. Web Start is a product from Sun that is used to download the Ptolemy II 6.0.2 Web Edition. Sun's Java Web Start is included in version 1.4

n. Sun's Java Web Start is included in version 1.4.1 or later of Sun's Java Runtime Environment (JRE) or Java Development Kit (JDK). In other words, If you have Java 1.4.1 or later installed, then Web Start is already installed! This web page attempt
